title: DBSplitter
description: The DBSplitter interface is implemented by classes in this directory to handle various data types. These classes collaborate with the DataDrivenDBInputFormat class to read input data from a database table and generate input splits for processing. The architecture ensures scalability, maintainability, and reliability by separating concerns and using appropriate technologies.
raw_response:
TITLE: DBSplitter

DESCRIPTION:
The DBSplitter interface is implemented by classes in this directory to handle various data types. These classes collaborate with the DataDrivenDBInputFormat class to read input data from a database table and generate input splits for processing. The architecture ensures scalability, maintainability, and reliability by separating concerns and using appropriate technologies.
